title: Secure Application Development - Built with Cybersecurity at the Core
shortPositioning: At KODESEC, we do not just develop websites. We engineer secure, scalable digital platforms designed to operate safely in today's threat landscape. Modern applications handle sensitive data, authentication, transactions, and business-critical workflows, where even one vulnerability can cause breach, reputation damage, and financial loss. That is why security is built into our foundation from day one.
keyApproach: Secure architecture design before development begins
Secure coding practices across the development lifecycle
scopeFeatures: Security controls embedded at architecture and code level
Validation-driven development to reduce risk as the system evolves
Exploitation-based validation of potential attack paths
Security findings report with remediation roadmap
whatYouGet: Built-in security assurance before production go-live
Documented findings from penetration and exploitation validation
Production deployment only after identified issues are addressed

delivery.title: Launch Secure Platforms with Confidence
delivery.description: We integrate secure development, validation, and final assurance so your platform reaches production with security engineered into every layer.

title: Infrastructure Automation
shortPositioning: At KodeSec, we design and implement structured automation to eliminate manual errors, increase deployment speed, and ensure consistent environments. Automation ensures predictable deployments, repeatable builds, and operational efficiency.
keyApproach: Multi-environment consistency across Dev, Staging, and Production
scopeFeatures: Reverse proxy and web server configuration
whatYouGet: Reliable infrastructure operations with reduced manual failure points
Scalable cloud foundations built for production growth
DevOps-aligned delivery focused on consistency and speed

delivery.title: Cloud Infrastructure and DevOps Solutions Built for Growth
delivery.description: We deliver reliable, scalable, and maintainable infrastructure with structured automation and modern DevOps implementation.

title: Manual Website Penetration Testing - Professional Security Assessment
shortPositioning: Protect your web application with structured, in-depth manual penetration testing performed using industry-standard methodologies. At KODESEC, we conduct controlled exploitation testing to identify real, actionable security weaknesses, not just automated scan results.
whatYouGet: In-depth manual security validation focused on exploitable risk
Actionable findings and remediation guidance your team can implement
Professional report suitable for technical and stakeholder review
Delivery timeline: 4-7 days depending on scope and application size

delivery.title: Strengthen Your Security Posture Before Attackers Exploit It
delivery.description: Contact us to define testing scope and boundaries, then receive a structured manual assessment with verified and remediable findings.

title: Network Infrastructure Penetration Testing - Internal Security Assessment
shortPositioning: Identify weaknesses inside your network before attackers exploit them. At KODESEC, we conduct controlled internal penetration testing to evaluate the security posture of your network infrastructure, servers, and internal services. This service simulates an attacker who has gained internal access to assess how far they could move within your environment.
keyApproach: Testing performed safely in a controlled and agreed scope
scopeFeatures: Internal network mapping and service enumeration
Open port and exposed service identification
SMB, RDP, and SSH security checks
whatYouGet: Ideal for offices with internal networks, on-premise servers, VPN-connected environments, and organizations preparing for compliance audits
technologies: Privilege Escalation and Lateral Movement Testing

delivery.title: Strengthen Internal Infrastructure Before Attackers Move Laterally
delivery.description: Delivery time depends on network size and scope and is finalized before engagement.
